creator: kib@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Edward Tomasz Napierala from comment #11)
I asked myself the same question when I wrote this min fix.  Please look at kern_vm_mprotect.  The function does not validate prot, the argument is masked by VM_PROT_ALL.

In the larger patch, kern_mprotect() receives int prot, but still masks it.
